resources.name: Hydrogen
resources.description: The most abundant element. Primary fuel for fusion reactors.

resources.name: Helium-3
resources.description: A rare isotope used in advanced fusion drives.

resources.name: Carbon
resources.description: Allotrope-rich element used in composites and manufacturing.

resources.name: Silicon
resources.description: Essential for computer chips and solar panels.

resources.name: Iron
resources.description: The backbone of starship hull construction.

resources.name: Copper
resources.description: High-conductivity metal for wiring and power systems.

resources.name: Aluminum
resources.description: Lightweight structural metal for ship frames.

resources.name: Titanium
resources.description: High-strength alloy component for armor plating.

resources.name: Uranium
resources.description: Fissile material for older reactor designs and munitions.

resources.name: Silver
resources.description: Precious metal used in advanced circuitry and optics.

resources.name: Platinum
resources.description: Rare catalyst metal with high industrial demand.

resources.name: Gold
resources.description: Corrosion-resistant precious metal for critical electronics.

resources.name: Neodymium
resources.description: Rare-earth element essential for powerful magnets.

resources.name: Fuel Cell
resources.description: A compact energy cell that can be refined into ship fuel.
